sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n74879" key="o)ressi/xutos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀρεσσῐ´-χῠτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n74879.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">pouring from the mountains,</tr_> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2045.tlg001.perseus-grc1:20:337" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">20.337</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
